description:
Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic regarding sums of money owed by Umm Waḥsh. 

There are also jottings of accounts in Arabic script, probably the earlier use of this fragment. These mention names such as Ibrāhīm b. Ismāʿīl, ʿAlī b. [...], Abū Bakr, and ʿĪsā. The top entry on verso refers to Sūq Barbar.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
